definition: A dependent-origination link named on the side of cessation and quenching.
notes: Use this record when the reverse dependent-arising link is named compactly as jati-nirodha rather than quoted as the fuller reverse-line sentence. Keep the link aligned with the repository's updated default of birth for jati, and do not narrow it to rebirth unless the surrounding doctrinal frame explicitly requires that reading.

example_phrases.translation: with the quenching of birth, ageing and dying

translation_policy.default_scope: Use for the compact named jati-nirodha link inside the reverse dependent-arising family; prefer fuller reverse-line wording when the canonical sentence is present.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten nirodha into generic cessation language, and do not harden jati into rebirth by default in this link.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the terminal reverse link from inheriting an undocumented narrowing of jati into rebirth.
